mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate elevated above 4.5% signals monetary tightening that increases discount rates on future corporate earnings, compressing equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in more than 55% of instances when FEDFUNDS > 4.5%, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month decline in nonfarm payroll employment signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer spending capacity and corporate earnings expectations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60-day forward returns show no significant negative correlation with PAYEMS month-over-month changes (correlation > -0.15), or mechanism fails to predict direction in > 40% of test periods.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts decline below 1200 thousand units signals demand destruction in residential construction and related consumer spending, which cascades into negative equity returns as forward earnings expectations decline over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns are positive in more than 50% of months when HOUST < 1200, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declines month-over-month while unemployment rate rises simultaneously, indicating stagflationary pressure that erodes profit margins and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO declines MoM AND UNRATE rises > 0.2pp
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO at 114.357 and UNRATE at 4.7% as of 2007-09-15
failure_condition: Joint occurrence of INDPRO decline and UNRATE rise does not predict negative 5-day returns with Rank IC > 0.05, or mechanism shows no directional consistency across 3+ years of data.

mechanism_narrative: Real retail sales and food services decline month-over-month while housing starts fall simultaneously, indicating broad-based demand destruction across consumer and residential sectors that reduces forward corporate earnings, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines MoM AND HOUST declines MoM
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 380259 million and HOUST at 1191 thousand as of 2007-09-15
failure_condition: Simultaneous MoM declines in RSAFS and HOUST fail to predict negative 20-day returns with Rank IC > 0.04, or mechanism produces false signals in > 45% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation measured by CPI remains elevated above 2.5% while federal funds rate is held above 4.5%, signaling monetary policy lag that constrains real economic growth and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 208.903 and FEDFUNDS at 4.76% as of 2007-10-15
regime_hint: monetary policy tightening with inflation persistence
failure_condition: Simultaneous high inflation and high rates do not produce negative 60-day returns with Rank IC > 0.06, or mechanism fails directional prediction in > 40% of test periods.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rises above 4.8% signals labor market deterioration that reduces consumer confidence and spending, which cascades into lower corporate earnings expectations and negative equity valuations over the next 5 trading days in late-cycle expansion regimes.
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with labor market softening
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns are positive in more than 55% of instances when UNRATE > 4.8%, or Rank IC < 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth measured by GDPC1 declines quarter-over-quarter while nonfarm payroll employment falls simultaneously, indicating recession onset that produces sharp negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days as equity risk premiums expand.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 QoQ decline AND PAYEMS declines MoM
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 at 11630.7 billion and PAYEMS at 138421 thousand as of 2007-07-15
failure_condition: Simultaneous QoQ GDP decline and MoM payroll decline fail to predict negative 60-day returns with Rank IC > 0.08, or mechanism produces false signals in > 35% of triggered instances.
